reason:
All 5 fixes in v5.0.1 are internal implementation corrections. No new APIs, no parameter changes, no documented behavior contract changes, and no breaking changes. Detailed disqualification rationale per fix:

  Fix 1 (TEMP_COMPOSER_ persistence): Internal service-layer early-return guard on private methods (CommentService.updateComment, ViewsService.setCommentAnnotationAsRead, ViewsService.setCommentAnnotationAsUnread). No public API surface. No skill update warranted.

  Fix 2 (markAsRead guard for temp annotations): markAsRead() is a documented public method but the fix corrects runtime behavior on an invalid internal state (temp annotations). No signature change, no parameter added or removed, no documented contract altered. No skill update warranted.

  Fix 3 (Comments Sidebar locationName fallback): locationName and locationId are already documented in data-models.mdx. The fix corrects internal sort logic (sortPageFilters, filterGroupedAnnotations) to apply the existing fallback correctly. No new fields or API changes. No skill update warranted.

  Fix 4 (Notification config race condition): Internal async guard via a generation counter in the private NotificationService.getInitialConfigFromDB() method. Not referenced in any public documentation. No skill update warranted.

  Fix 5 (Video timeline parseFloat): Internal input setter on CommentPlayerTimelineComponent (totalMediaLength). Not a public API parameter and belongs to the Video Editor feature area, which is outside the Comments/Notifications/CRDT scope. No skill update warranted.
